note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left heel wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left heel measures 2.7 cm x 3.2 cm x 0.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 56% slough, 44% granulation tissue. Periwound: indurated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Left heel — improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Nutritional consult ordered.

Pt seen for wound eval. Pressure Ulcer Left heel measures aprx 2.7 x 3.2cm, depth 0.2cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - R heel 1.6x1.9, 0.1cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
